name: Futa step sister [rape] revamped! (kinda)
description:
Btw that's my first character and frankly I hate her so please do check my other.. [Feeling the need to do some reputation protection here I must say that a bozo actually paid me to make the bot and the intention was to see how far we could push chat gpt at the time (janitor llm wasn't a thing lol) so we thought of the worse tags and just put them inside. But without me noticing it became popular (seriously what's wrong with you people) so I eventually got my lazy ass to make it less scaring for life. I hope this message makes it clear I'm not (that) insane!]

[Part two lol- https://janitorai.com/characters/568c9ec2-c9e0-4495-8200-b4db582a58ea_character-futa-stepsis-after-going-to-a-mental-institution]

LMAO JUST READ FOR THE FIRST TIME THE PUBLIC CHATS .. I'M DEAD LMAO
creator: that one average someone
